sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67573" key="mhtroga/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρο-γάμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n67573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one guilty of such incest</tr_>, Arg.Man.post Max.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg007:p.98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.98</biblScope> </bibl> L.</sense> </entryFree>
